detail: Hypothesis agreed (PLE vs raw numeric for MLP on non-monotonic synthetic target), HYPOTHESIS.md written, beginning investigation
Wrote minimal PoC: synthetic non-monotonic (sine-logit) target, quantile-PLE encoder, logreg baseline + raw-MLP + PLE-MLP, AUC-ROC, 2-panel mechanism figure
PoC run: PLE-MLP beats raw-MLP by +0.029 AUC; trivial baseline weak (0.62) confirming genuine non-monotonic structure
Wrote README.md: hypothesis, quickstart, pipeline (data->encode->model->score->visualize), output, scope exclusions
Step 2 intent review: verified no train/test leakage (scaler+PLE edges fit on train only); identified capacity confound and viz-slice as intentional/deferred, not bugs
Stage A.1: dispatching ml-critic R1 (initial critique, Mode 1) on PoC; JSON-first instruction per known prose-default quirk

ml-critic R1 returned valid JSON: 5 non-suppressed findings (F1 missing LR-PLE baseline, F2 capacity confound, F3 unverified convergence, F4 PLE-linearization unverified, F5 noise amplification). No FATALs.
Stage A.2: dispatching ml-defender R1 (initial defense, Mode 1) against 5 critic findings; JSON-first instruction
ml-defender R1: empirical_test_agreed. F1/F3/F4 DEFER (adj 6/5/5), F2 REBUT-DESIGN (6->2), F5 REBUT-IMMATERIAL (2->0). No concessions.
Stage B round 1: dispatching ml-critic-r2 to challenge defender R1 rebuttals
ml-critic-r2 round 1: 4 ACCEPT (F1,F3,F4,F5), 1 CHALLENGE (F2 - capacity confound severity 2 disproportionate, should be DEFER at 5)
Stage B.2 round 1: dispatching ml-defender R2 (Mode 2) to respond to F2 challenge; is_final_round=false
Round 1 derive_verdict: case_verdict=empirical_test_agreed (F1-F4 ETA via DEFER, F5 defense_wins). 4 deferred, no critique_wins.
Round 1 not converged: round 1 < min_rounds 2. Proceeding to round 2.
Stage B round 2: re-dispatching ml-critic-r2 against defender R2 state (F2 now DEFER@5 as critic proposed)
ml-critic-r2 round 2: all 5 ACCEPT. Defender positions now sound; no residual challenges.
B.1 early-exit: all challenges ACCEPT and round 2 >= min_rounds 2; skipping B.2 (defender would trivially MAINTAIN). State unchanged -> verdict identical to round 1.
Debate converged after 2 rounds. Final case_verdict=empirical_test_agreed: F1-F4 -> empirical tests, F5 defense_wins.

Gate 1 plan built: 6 PENDING items (F1-F4 debate DEFERs as tests T1-T4, T5 falsification-lever from HYPOTHESIS.md, trivial baseline), F5 CLOSED. 6 conditions x 2 datasets, bootstrap CIs, 10 seeds. Promotion: stay ad-hoc.

User approved experiment plan AND chose Metaflow promotion (override of ad-hoc recommendation). Proceeding: intent-watch pre-reg lock -> pipeline-init scaffold -> lint/reviewer/determinism gate -> run flow.
intent-watch clean pass: 8 artifacts evaluated, no conflicts with HYPOTHESIS.md. T5 falsification lever present; plan additions extend not contradict. Pre-registration boundary LOCKED.
Beginning Metaflow promotion via pipeline-init: scaffold flow + migrate PoC into make_data/build_model/train_arm/metric seams

Scaffolded Metaflow+Hydra flow: ple_flow.py (6 seams), conf/ (config,data/ple_synth,training/default,experiment/ple_vs_raw,6 methods), SCHEMA+CONTRACT copied. sklearn-based (matches debated methodology). Deviation: dropped torch from deps (unused).
Gate layer 2 (lint): flow-lint.py exit 0; py_compile OK. All 5 mechanical anti-patterns clear.
Gate layer 3 (review): dispatching pipeline-reviewer for 5 intent-fidelity invariants

Gate layer 3 (review): pipeline-reviewer PASS on all 5 fidelity invariants (split, reshuffle symmetry, axes-match-source, metric quantity, sweep override). Non-blocking. T3 operationalization judged faithful.

Gate layer 4 (prove): determinism-check PASS - aggregates bit-identical across --max-workers 1 vs 8. order_independent contract satisfied. Fixed order-sensitive bootstrap (sort vals by seed) before passing.
Metaflow promotion complete: all 4 gate layers green (prevent/lint/review/prove). Flow is the SSOT for the methodology.
Step 6: full experiment executed via promoted flow (2 targets x 10 seeds x 6 arms). Results in stats_results.json + Metaflow datastore.

10-seed CIs: T-main CONFIRMED (mlp_ple-mlp_raw nonmono +0.035 CI[0.025,0.045]); T1 critique-validated (logreg_ple-logreg_raw +0.235, general linearization); T2 defense (beats wider raw +0.030 & RFF +0.177); T3 defense (all converge <=134 iters); T4 mechanism confirmed (PLE R2 0.10->0.985); T5 lever passes (gap reverses to -0.010 on linear). SURPRISE: logreg_ple is best arm.

Step 7: CONCLUSIONS.md with debate scorecard + 6 figures. Claim CONFIRMED (+0.035 CI-separated); mechanism REFUTED (general linearization, not MLP-specific); logreg_ple best arm. Macro-iteration Outcome A (proceed) - surprise was F1-anticipated.

Step 9: REPORT_ADDENDUM.md reference-model re-eval. Recommendation REINFORCED (PLE+logreg is best AND simplest to operate). Key scope limit flagged: additive target favors per-feature PLE; interactions untested. Deployment roadmap shadow->canary->full.

Investigation complete (conclusions_only, debate). Claim CONFIRMED (PLE-MLP +0.035 CI-separated, structure-specific); mechanism REFUTED (general linearization, logreg_ple best arm). Promoted to gated Metaflow flow (4/4 gates). Optional steps 11/13 declined. README left as Step-2 PoC artifact per user.
